title: Geepas 25W Electric Citrus Juicer | Lemon Squeezer for Orange Lime Grapefruit | 1.2L Capacity Bi-Directional Twist Dual Cone Auto Start | Quick Fresh Healthy Nutritious Juice Daily | 2 Year Warranty
features: ✅ LARGE 1.2L CAPACITY FOR FAMILY JUICING-Juice enough for the whole family in one go with the generous 1.2L jug. Clear measurement markings help you monitor every pour. This high-efficiency juicer machine makes mornings easier and healthier.

✅ 2 INTERCHANGEABLE CONES FOR ALL SIZES-Get perfect results for any citrus fruit with two cone sizes. Swap between small and large fruits in seconds. The built-in lemon squeezer is ideal for everything from limes to grapefruits.

✅ EASY TO USE FOR EFFORTLESS JUICE EXTRACTION - Simply cut the orange in half, place one piece gently onto the suitable cone, and the automatic citrus press will begin rotating in both directions for maximum juice extraction. No buttons, no hassle—just freshly squeezed juice in seconds. Ideal for oranges, lemons, limes, and other citrus fruits.

✅ BI-DIRECTION TWIST WITH FILTER - The juicer can twist in both directions. This smart spinning system reduces pulp waste and boosts juice yield. Filtered design to separate the pulp from the juice for a smooth taste. Ideal for everyday use as your go-to orange juicer at home.
✅ BUILT-IN PULP FILTER – This electric citrus juicer includes a fixed pulp filter that separates seeds and excess pulp. Enjoy smooth, refreshing juice every time with no need for manual straining.
description: Product Description SMOOTH JUICE EVERYTIME This simple machine makes delicious juices while maintaining the natural flavour and preserving the nutrients. BI-DIRECTION TWIST Smart juicer with dual-direction twist spins to reduce pulp waste and maximize juice yield for fresh, efficient squeezing. LARGE CAPACITY JUG 1.2L juice container with clear measurement markings for easy pouring and perfect juice preparation every time. TWO CONE SIZES Get perfect juice from any citrus fruit with two cone sizes for easy, efficient squeezing every time. BUILT-IN PULP FILTER Electric citrus juicer with fixed pulp filter separates seeds and excess pulp for smooth, fresh juice every time. QUIET OPERATION Quiet operation fruit juicer machine ensures peaceful, efficient juicing for a fresh, healthy start every day. EASY TO CLEAN Detachable parts for easy cleaning and hassle-free maintenance — keeps your appliance spotless every time. TRASNPARENT JUICE CONTAINER Juicer extractor with transparent 1.2L jug for easy juice collection and efficient squeezing in one go.
